description: Changing line transformation rules for the cellular automaton. For each hexagram, changing lines produce a new hexagram. Moving yang (9)→yin (8), moving yin (6)→yang (7).

classic_rules.old_yang_9: Solid line (yang=1) changes to broken (yin=0): bit flips 1→0
classic_rules.old_yin_6: Broken line (yin=0) changes to solid (yang=1): bit flips 0→1

cellular_automaton_rule: new_bit = 1 - old_bit if moving, else old_bit. Equivalent to XOR with a mask of changing lines.
boundary_rule: For spatial automaton: each cell's changing lines determined by XOR pressure from neighbors. neighbor_xor = left_hex XOR right_hex. Bits set in neighbor_xor become candidates for changing lines.

hexagram_transformations.name_en: Work on What Has Been Spoiled
The Taming Power of the Great
